## LibraryRuntime.AnyConfection type

Union type of all concrete confection classes. Use this type when you need to work with any confection.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyConfection = MoldedBonBon | BarTruffle | RolledTruffle;
```
**References:** [MoldedBonBon](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.moldedbonbon.md)<!-- -->, [BarTruffle](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.bartruffle.md)<!-- -->, [RolledTruffle](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.rolledtruffle.md)
